content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

March 23, 2010

Denis R. Bilodeau
Councilmember, City of Orange
300 E. Chapman Avenue
Orange, CA 92866

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-10-054

Dear Mr. Bilodeau:

This letter is to notify you that we have withdrawn the above captioned request for advice based on your instructions in our telephone conversation of March 23, 2010. I have attached a copy of the Wick Advice Letter No. I-87-116 (which we discussed), as well as a fact sheet that might be useful with respect to your questions.

If you have any questions, feel free to call me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Scott Hallabrin
General Counsel

By: Raheel Hayat
Legal Intern, Legal Division
